scripts.dev:backend: env UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --directory backend uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.test:backend: env UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --directory backend pytest
scripts.lint:backend: env UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --directory backend ruff check .
scripts.format:backend: env UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --directory backend ruff format .
